headline: Nvidia stock plummets 5% post-earnings as investors worry about AI chip competition narrowing
analysis: Nvidia's Q4 2026 earnings missed expectations on guidance narrowing. Investors concerned about eroding competitive moat as competitors develop alternative AI chips. Worst single-day stock drop in 10 months signals market fragility on AI hype. Cascading selloff across semiconductor and tech sectors.

headline: US wholesale inflation (PPI) surges to 10-month high: headline 0.5% m/m, services +0.8%, annual rate 3.6%
analysis: January PPI data released Feb 27 shows persistent inflation pressure. Services component especially hot (+0.8% m/m) driven by logistics costs and energy rebound. Annual rate hits 3.6%, highest in 10 months. Rattles Fed consensus on 'soft landing,' may complicate future rate cut timeline. Stagflation concerns resurface.

headline: S&P 500 closes down 0.8%, NASDAQ down 0.93%, Dow down 1.06% on tech selloff and inflation worries
analysis: US equity markets close in red across all major indices. Nvidia pullback drags down NASDAQ disproportionately. PPI surprise adds to selling pressure as inflation data complicates Fed easing assumptions. Risk-off sentiment persists, rotation away from mega-cap tech accelerating.

headline: EUR/USD weakens to 1.1796, down 0.06% on day, down 1.32% month-on-month amid ECB hold signals
analysis: Euro continues structural weakness vs USD. ECB remains on hold at 2% (held Feb 5), no hike signals through 2026. Fed policy divergence maintains USD bid despite recent dollar weakness narrative. 12-month gain of +13.67% masks recent month deterioration amid risk-off equity environment.

headline: Bitcoin exhibits historic bear market price pattern at $65,516; crypto selloff alongside equity volatility and Nvidia drawdown
analysis: BTC trading at $65,516 shows chart pattern that preceded previous bear market bottoms. Magic Eden shutting down Bitcoin NFT marketplace signals market contraction. Crypto broadly de-risking alongside equities following tech earnings disappointment. Ethereum, Solana, XRP posting 24-hour losses. Risk-off regime favors fiat and commodities over digital assets.

headline: Gold rallies to $5,235/oz amid risk-off environment, up from $5,165 on Feb 26 as safe-haven demand surges
analysis: Gold strengthens as equities weaken and inflation persistence becomes clearer. Flight to safety from tech selloff and higher-than-expected PPI data. Gold approaching recent highs, maintaining multi-year bull trend. Supports portfolio hedging amid stagflation concerns. March trading range expected $5,107–$5,208.

headline: European equities mixed: STOXX 600 flat +0.1%, DAX and CAC near flatline, FTSE +0.2% on earnings backdrop
analysis: European markets resilient to US tech selloff but lack catalyst for outperformance. Euro Stoxx 50 at 6,185 (+0.2% prior session). DAX and CAC struggling near breakeven. ECB macro settings (2% held through 2026, no changes expected) limit upside. Corporate earnings season mixed. Spillover from US tech weakness likely to weigh on close-of-day session.
